import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, x)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut i = 0
    while i < xs.len()
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if not inserted and x < v
          result = list.push(result, x)
          inserted = true
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn merge_into(_ acc: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result = acc
  mut i = 0
  while i < b.len()
    match b.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = insert_sorted(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums1 = parse_line(line1)
let nums2 = parse_line(line2)
let empty: List<Int> = []
let step1 = merge_into(empty, nums1)
let sorted = merge_into(step1, nums2)

mut out = ""
mut i = 0
while i < sorted.len()
  match sorted.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
